rules: Use tracking-tight for all H1 and H2.
Never center default headings unless it balances a bento grid.
Use uppercase with wide tracking for overlines.
95% monochrome, color exists only to guide action.
Use 1px border with 10% opacity black/gray for containers.
Ensure all text over images uses proper contrast overlays (bg-black/50).

components.name: Navigation
components.rules: Fixed, sticky top with backdrop-blur-xl and solid bg-white/90. Must contain Denplex Logo (/denplex-logo.png) and CTA buttons: 'Sign In' (/login), '30-day Free Trial' (/trial), 'Customer Portal' (/portal). Keep links clearly visible.

components.name: Hero Section
components.rules: Dark overlay on a manufacturing background image (bg-black/50). Large Chivo heading 'Complete Engineering Solutions.' or 'Precision Engineering, Refined.' Primary CTA 'Start 30-day Free Trial' linking to /trial, secondary 'Customer Portal' linking to /portal. Use White text for high contrast.

components.name: Trust Strip
components.rules: A dense, monochrome bar displaying key stats: 'Established 2015', '400+ Customers', '3,700+ Unique Parts', 'ISO-Compliant QC', 'UDYAM-GJ-09-0005351', 'GSTIN 24AALFD1671P1Z2'.

components.name: Capabilities Bento Grid
components.rules: Use a bento-style asymmetrical grid. Sections: Jigs & Fixtures, Precision Machined Components, Job Work (CNC milling, VMC, Surface Grinding), Quality Inspection. Use crisp images with 1px borders. Apply generous padding (p-8).

components.name: Clients Marquee
components.rules: Continuous scrolling marquee using CSS or framer-motion. Monochrome text names of clients (Voltas Beko Home Appliances, Versuni India Home Solutions, BOSCH Home Comfort, Astral Limited, Bectochem Loedige, Highly Electrical Appliances, Airmax Pneumatics, Ideal3D, Global Engineers, Kapson Engineering) in a bold typeface with generous gap.

components.name: Plant & Capabilities (Equipment List)
components.rules: Dense, Control-Room style grid for the equipment list (CNC, VMC, Surface Grinding, Wire-cut EDM, Coordinate Measuring, etc.). Minimalist list with 1px separators.

components.name: Units & Addresses
components.rules: Two clear cards with location icons, showcasing Unit-1 (Shed No.4 Shriram Estate Santej Kalol) and Unit-2 (Shed No.20 Pushkar Mahadev Estate-1 Vatva Ahmedabad-382445).

components.name: Contact & Footer
components.rules: Generous spacing (py-24). Highlight email (denplexengineering@gmail.com) and phone (+91 9033338999). Include GSTIN and UDYAM in the footer text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Replace /app/frontend/src/pages/Landing.jsx with the new design. Create any new local components needed within the same file or in a specific UI folder if preferred, but keep file count minimal.
Do not change any backend or auth code. Ensure frontend routes like /login, /trial, /portal remain untouched in routing logic.
Use framer-motion if installed, otherwise use raw Tailwind CSS for animations.
Ensure the hero uses the hero_background image with a dark overlay to maintain text contrast (use White text on hero).
Use lucide-react for all icons (e.g., Factory, Settings, MapPin, Phone, Mail).
Implement the bento grid for the Capabilities section.
Use the exact client names for the marquee.
Add data-testid attributes to all CTA buttons.
Stick to the established brand colors: Red (#DC2626) and Black (#0A0A0A). Avoid purple or teal.
